ns0:entry.ns0:title: Apicurio/apicurio-registry
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Apicurio/apicurio-registry
Language: java
An API/Schema registry - stores APIs and Schemas.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AutoMQ/automq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AutoMQ/automq
Language: java
Diskless Kafka® on S3. 10x Cost-Effective. No Cross-AZ Traffic Cost. Autoscale in seconds. Single-digit ms latency. Multi-AZ Availability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenLineage/OpenLineage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenLineage/OpenLineage
Language: java
An Open Standard for lineage metadata collection

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageerle/ruoyi-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageerle/ruoyi-ai
Language: java
面向企业级市场的一站式AI应用开发框架，支持多厂商大模型统一接入与管理，具备安全可控的企业知识库与高精度检索优化能力，提供可视化流程编排、自主决策智能体与多智能体协同调度，兼容主流 Agent Skill 协议，帮助企业与开发者零门槛快速构建安全、高效、可落地的AI智能体应用与行业解决方案。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/spring-ai-alibaba
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/spring-ai-alibaba
Language: java
Agentic AI Framework for Java Developers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/beam
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/beam
Language: java
Apache Beam is a unified programming model for Batch and Streaming data processing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/cloudstack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/cloudstack
Language: java
Apache CloudStack is an opensource Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) cloud computing platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/fineract
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/fineract
Language: java
Apache Fineract

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/hbase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/hbase
Language: java
Apache HBase

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/hive
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/hive
Language: java
Apache Hive

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/struts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/struts
Language: java
Apache Struts is a free, open-source, MVC framework for creating elegant, modern Java web applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/copilot-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk
Language: java
Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iflytek/skillhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iflytek/skillhub
Language: java
Self-hosted, open-source agent skill registry for enterprises. Publish & version skill packages, govern with RBAC and audit logs, deploy on-premise with Docker or Kubernetes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kekingcn/kkFileView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kekingcn/kkFileView
Language: java
Universal File Online Preview Project based on Spring-Boot

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kestra-io/kestra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kestra-io/kestra
Language: java
Event Driven Orchestration & Scheduling Platform for Mission Critical Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain4j/langchain4j
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j
Language: java
LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microg/GmsCore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microg/GmsCore
Language: java
Free implementation of Play Services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nageoffer/ragent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nageoffer/ragent
Language: java
企业级 Agentic RAG 智能体 - 全链路覆盖文档解析、多路检索、意图识别、问题重写、会话记忆、MCP 工具调用与深度思考。面向真实业务场景，从 0 到 1 完整工程实现。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xuxueli/xxl-job
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xuxueli/xxl-job
Language: java
A distributed task scheduling framework.（分布式任务调度平台XXL-JOB）
